name: Smart Highway Monitoring
objective: Real-time civil structural monitoring for national highways with sensor dashboards and alert systems.
outcomes: Monitoring 500 km of highways with 3 early structural failure detections preventing accidents.

name: Infrastructure CSS Monitoring
objective: Continuous structural health monitoring for government buildings and public infrastructure.
outcomes: 120 government buildings under continuous monitoring with automated safety alerts.

name: Bridge Health CSS
objective: Wireless sensor network for bridge structural integrity with ML-based anomaly detection.
outcomes: 120 bridges monitored nationally with predictive maintenance reducing repair costs by 35%.

name: Manufacturing Skills CSS
objective: Competency assessment and certification system for manufacturing workforce.
outcomes: 8,500 workers certified and placed in automotive and electronics manufacturing.

name: Solar Farm Monitoring CSS
objective: Structural and performance monitoring for agrivoltaic solar installations.
outcomes: 15MW clean energy generated while maintaining 85% crop yield on shared land.

name: Dam Safety CSS
objective: Comprehensive dam safety monitoring with seepage, displacement, and reservoir level tracking.
outcomes: 45 dams under real-time safety monitoring protecting 2 lakh downstream residents.

name: Building Energy CSS
objective: Energy efficiency monitoring and green building certification support for government complexes.
outcomes: 30% energy reduction across 25 government buildings in Bengaluru.

name: Rural Connectivity CSS
objective: Monitoring rural road construction quality and connectivity index for village accessibility.
outcomes: 3,200 km of rural roads quality-assessed improving village connectivity index by 40%.
